creator: tobias.rehbein@web.de
text:
Update www/nanoblogger and www/nanoblogger-extra to the latest version. This fixes some bash 4 incompatibilities.

        As both ports need to be in sync I filed only one PR.

How-To-Repeat:         Apply attached patches.

        Files removed during this update:
        www/nanoblogger/files/patch-plugins__archive__master_index.sh
        www/nanoblogger/files/patch-plugins__archive__year__year_archive.sh
        www/nanoblogger/files/patch-plugins__page__feed_links.sh
